samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), selected for full annotation in lincoln-metaphor-analysis. A v4 expansion to 48 core documents is tracked in PPW #195. Validation (75-100 docs) and reference tiers are tracked in PPW #196 and #197 respectively as separate future corpus records.
notes: Corpus document metadata and raw text import planned for Milestones 15-16 (see docs/architecture/imported-projects.md). No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #137.

samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning American Revolution, Napoleonic, Lincoln, and Nazi-era cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. American Revolution and Napoleon case mapping to PPW cases is pending confirmation (PPW #149-#151). Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: American Revolution and Napoleon cases do not yet have corresponding PPW case files; case mapping must be confirmed (PPW #149-#151) before their corpus subsets are imported. Corpus import planned for Milestone 17. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #138.
